name: shadchanai
description: Matchmaking management system for religious communities

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=server && npm run lint --workspace=client
